news.headline: Akastor ASA to present Q2 results on July 11, 2024, at 15:00 CET. CEO and CFO to lead the webcast.
news.summary: Akastor ASA, based in Oslo, Norway, will be hosting a webcast to present their financial results for the first quarter of 2024. The event is scheduled for Thursday, July 11, 2024, at 15:00 CET. CEO Karl Erik Kjelstad and Øyvind will be the presenters. This event is an opportunity for investors and analysts to gain insights into the company's performance during the first quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Advantest's VOICE 2024 in San Diego attracted record attendance with major semiconductor companies discussing latest technologies.
news.summary: The annual developer conference recently brought together major semiconductor companies for discussions on the latest technologies and industry trends. The event featured participation from leading companies in the semiconductor sector, with a focus on addressing key issues and advancements in the industry. Attendees had the opportunity to engage in dialogue regarding cutting-edge technologies and emerging trends shaping the semiconductor landscape. This conference serves as a crucial platform for professionals to exchange insights and collaborate on innovative solutions.

news.headline: Crédit Mutuel Alliance Fédérale partners with IBM to deploy generative AI, saving nearly 1 million advisor hours.
news.summary: In Strasbourg, France, and Armonk, New York, on June 27, 2024, Crédit Mutuel Alliance Fédérale, known for its early embrace of Artificial Intelligence (AI) starting in 2016, is making significant investments in advanced technologies. With AI integrated into the daily operations of its 25,000 advisors, the company has saved almost 1 million hours through automation and innovation.

news.headline: OPEC Fund Development Forum in Vienna concludes with commitments, new projects, and partnerships to address global development challenges.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, the third OPEC Fund Development Forum took place in Vienna, a global event focused on South-South cooperation. The event saw the conclusion of the forum with notable commitments, new project signings, and partnership agreements being made. Participants pledged to address pressing global development challenges, with a particular focus on climate change. Key figures involved included representatives from various countries, organizations, and businesses, indicating a strong collective effort towards sustainable and impactful development initiatives.

news.headline: OSS Ventures secures €8.5 million in funding to advance operations and fuel the future of factories.
news.summary: In a recent development on June 27, 2024, OSS Ventures, a prominent industrial start-up studio based in France, excitedly disclosed a successful fundraising of €8.5 million. The financing round was spearheaded by Tikehau Capital and France 2030's French Tech Accélération 2 fund, supported by Bpifrance.

news.headline: Darktrace wins 2024 Microsoft UK Partner of the Year Award for outstanding innovation - global recognition.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from Cambridge, UK on June 27, 2024, Darktrace was revealed as the recipient of the prestigious UK 2024 Microsoft Partner of the Year Award. This accolade signifies Darktrace's achievement in standing out from a competitive worldwide pool of Microsoft partners by showcasing outstanding innovation and customer implementation strategies.

news.headline: abrdn money market fund now accessible and transferable on Algorand blockchain using Quantoz EURD token, with "no-code" atomic settlement.
news.summary: Today, the Algorand Foundation, Archax, and Quantoz Payments revealed a groundbreaking development in the trading realm. Algorand's unique "no-code" atomic settlement feature eliminates the need for smart contract code, streamlining trading processes. This innovation was announced in Barcelona, Spain, London, and Utrecht, The Netherlands on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Meristem introduces EXCAVATOR® AMS, combining surfactant, conditioner, residue breakdown, and nutrient release. Save on synthetic fertilizer costs. Columbus, Ohio - June 27, 2024.
news.summary: A company based in Columbus, Ohio, Meristem Crop Performance®, has revealed a new product, EXCAVATOR® AMS, on June 27, 2024. This innovative formulation of EXCAVATOR is enhanced by the patented MICROBILIZE™ technology, aiming to reduce costs associated with synthetic fertilizer and adjuvant purchases. This new development is targeted at providing a more convenient application method for users.

news.headline: Mintos introduces Smart Cash with BlackRock-managed fund to optimize cash holdings, providing diverse investment choices.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Berlin, Mintos, a prominent multi-asset platform that provides a blend of alternative and traditional investment choices, has introduced its newest product: Mintos Smart Cash. This new offering is a money market fund aimed at diversifying investment options for users.

news.headline: Pan Finance announced Q2 award winners of 2024; USA, UK had modest inflation declines, Euro Area facing rising inflation.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, it was reported that inflation rates exhibited modest decreases in the USA and the UK, while the Euro Area experienced a continual increase. The global economic growth is constrained by factors such as geopolitical conflicts, unstable trade partnerships, and severe climate phenomena. The respective inflation rate changes in the USA and the UK were minimal, with a slight decline, while the Euro Area observed a persistent upward trend. These trends are indicative of the challenges faced in the current economic landscape, influenced by geopolitical tensions, fluctuating trade agreements, and environmental disruptions.

news.headline: LabTrace uses blockchain for data integrity in Parkinson's disease study by King's College London on clinical observation data; Algorand blockchain used.
news.summary: A recent study on Parkinson's disease funded by King's College London has utilized the Algorand blockchain to validate clinical data. LabTrace, a blockchain platform focused on ensuring data integrity and verifying ownership, made this announcement on June 27, 2024. This development highlights the increasing significance of blockchain technology in scientific research.

news.headline: Top to bottom: AUD, JPY, NZD, GBP, EUR, CAD, CHF, USD - current currency strength chart without a specified source.
Stock futures down Thursday. Walgreens expected to report earnings of $0.71/share on revenue of $36B, shares up 0.6% after-hours. Micron Tech exceeds financial expectations.
news.summary: This morning, U.S. stock futures are down, drawing attention to specific stocks for investors. Wall Street projects Walgreens Boots Alliance, Inc. (NASDAQ: WBA) to announce earnings of $0.71 per share with revenue hitting $36.00 billion before the market opens. Walgreens' shares rose 0.6% to $15.75 in after-hours trading. Micron Technology Inc (NASDAQ: MU) also revealed better-than-anticipated financial performance. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Frontgrade Gaisler wins ESA contract to qualify GR716B microcontroller for spacecraft avionics, under Core Competitiveness program. Prototype launch expected this year.
news.summary: A company based in Gothenburg, Sweden called Frontgrade Gaisler has been awarded a contract by the European Space Agency (ESA) under the ARTES Core Competitiveness programme. The contract aims to qualify their GR716B microcontroller for flight. This microcontroller is known for being radiation-hardened and is used in space applications, particularly in spacecraft avionics. The prototype of this advanced microcontroller is set to be launched later this year. The ESA contract will assist in the thorough flight qualification process.

news.headline: South Korean gov't, NH Bank, & OurCrowd create $80M fund for DeepTech investments. $48M already raised. OurCrowd mobilizing 240K investors globally.
news.summary: A venture investor from Israel, OurCrowd, has been chosen by the South Korean government to jointly manage a bilateral investment fund aimed at supporting startups in both nations. The fund is set to reach $80 million, with $48 million already secured by the Korean partners NH Venture Investment and K-Growth. OurCrowd is in the process of raising funds from its extensive network of over 240,000 registered investors globally. The collaborative fund will facilitate investments in promising startups.

news.headline: Konvi offers exclusive investment opportunity in Alec Monopoly-designed Birkin bag.
news.summary: In Dublin, Konvi has revealed a rare chance for investors to partake in the release of a unique Birkin bag crafted by Alec Monopoly.

news.headline: GXO honored by Ex-Forces in Business for backing UK veterans. Nominated for Employer of the Year again.
news.summary: A prominent logistics company in the UK has been recognized as a nominee for the prestigious Employer of the Year Award for the second consecutive year by Ex-Forces in Business. This accolade highlights the company's dedication to supporting and empowering veterans in the workforce.

news.headline: Revolutionize your gardening with the Yard Force Cordless Tiller at Peavey Mart Canada. #EcoFriendly #Innovative #GardenMaintenance.
news.summary: Yard Force, a well-known brand in outdoor power equipment, is excited to launch the Yard Force Brushless Cordless Battery Rear Tine Tiller at Peavey Mart Canada. This new tiller provides Canadian homeowners with a powerful and environmentally friendly option for garden maintenance. The innovative equipment aims to revolutionize gardening routines by offering exceptional performance. The Yard Force Brushless Cordless Battery Rear Tine Tiller is now available, offering a sustainable solution to gardening needs.

news.headline: Leading lobbyist predicts London to have advantage over  France after US elections
UK job postings on Indeed show significant pay increase, highest since January.
Kenya's Ruto cancels $2.3B tax bill amid protests.
A groundbreaking superconducting fault current limiter by Nexans and SNCF Réseau transforms rail safety.
Spain's retail sales show a 0.2% YoY increase, missing the forecast of 0.7% and lower than the previous 0.3%.
New features in NVIDIA's Video Codec SDK 12.2 improve HEVC video quality with lookahead level, temporal filtering, & high bit-depth encoding.
news.summary: NVIDIA has launched Video Codec SDK 12.2, aimed at improving the quality of HEVC videos. The update includes new features such as lookahead level, temporal filtering, and high bit-depth encoding. These enhancements are set to enhance the overall video quality significantly.

news.headline: Ericsson's Q2 2024 report to be released at 7:00 AM CEST on July 12 with a webcast at 10:00 AM CEST on June 27.
news.summary: A report is scheduled for release at around 7:00 AM CEST on July 12, 2024. There will be a live video webcast at 10:00 AM CEST for analysts, investors, and journalists. The financial report for the second quarter of 2024 by Ericsson (NASDAQ: ERIC) is set to be published. The announcement was made in Stockholm on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Insider trades: Recent transactions by executives and closely-related individuals. #marketnews
Ripple (XRP) uses blockchain to improve payment reconciliation, boosting accuracy in global transactions.
news.summary: Using blockchain technology, Ripple (XRP) aims to improve accuracy and efficiency in global transactions by resolving payment reconciliation problems. This innovative approach has gained significant traction, with XRP being used in various financial sectors to streamline transactions and reduce errors. This technology has significantly increased speed and security, making it a popular choice for businesses looking to optimize their payment processes. With a market capitalization of over $10 billion, Ripple continues to expand its reach and impact in the financial industry.

news.headline: Spotlight Medical, startup from Institut Curie, launches to revolutionize cancer treatment using AI. Founded by a physician, AI researcher, and entrepreneur.
news.summary: A startup named Spotlight Medical, which emerged as a spinoff of Institut Curie in Paris, has recently debuted. The company is focused on revolutionizing cancer therapy through cutting-edge artificial intelligence (AI) technologies. The firm has harnessed a distinctive AI innovation crafted by experts from Institut Curie, Mines Paris – PSL, and Inserm after years of dedicated research. Spearheaded by a medical professional, an AI specialist, and a businessperson, Spotlight Medical is dedicated to tackling the pressing challenge of insufficient cancer care in the industry.

news.headline: Multilingual versions of "Keywords to Understand China" released, including 14 bilingual versions of "Organizational System of Governance."
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Beijing, a report was released detailing the launch of fourteen bilingual versions of "Keywords to Understand China: Organizational System of Governance." The multilingual versions aim to provide a comprehensive understanding of China's governance structure. The unveiling of these versions signifies a significant effort towards promoting cross-cultural understanding, with the content now available in multiple languages.

news.headline: Eiffage and Google Cloud team up to enhance AI strategy, streamline operations, and leverage data capital securely.
news.summary: Eiffage has joined forces with Google Cloud to enhance business productivity through a methodical utilization of data and AI. By implementing an AI strategy, Eiffage aims to streamline operations and elevate the worth of its substantial data assets in a secure and environmentally friendly manner. This collaboration will see Eiffage leveraging Google Cloud's technology to achieve these goals effectively.

news.headline: Monika Nachyła joins Šiaulių Bankas AB as a member of the Supervisory Council.
news.summary: In recent reports, it has been stated that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. Additionally, the number of new job openings has risen by 200,000, showing a positive trend in the job market. Analysts predict that this decrease in unemployment and increase in job availability will have a positive impact on the economy in the coming months. These statistics reflect a promising outlook for the labor market and suggest potential growth opportunities for individuals seeking employment.

news.headline: Oracle introduces in-database LLMs and automated vector store with HeatWave GenAI, simplifying generative AI with no extra costs.
news.summary: Oracle has enhanced its HeatWave GenAI platform by introducing in-database Large Language Models (LLMs) and a new automated vector store. These additions facilitate the development of generative AI applications without requiring specialized AI knowledge or incurring extra expenses.

news.headline: Critics criticize AI-generated Toys ‘R’ Us ad for being “weird dream” and “baffling,” facing backlash from viewers.
news.summary: The advertisement created by AI faced criticism from viewers who labeled it as surreal and confusing.

news.headline: Vanuatu poised to approve crypto bill in September after years of delays due to cabinet changes.
news.summary: According to a policy consultant in Vanuatu, it has been revealed that a bill has been prepared for a number of years but its progress has been hindered by numerous changes in the cabinet.

news.headline: South Korean crypto company, Hashed Ventures, is reportedly expanding to Abu Dhabi and collaborating with other firms from South Korea.
news.summary: Hashed Ventures is currently engaged in discussions with various South Korean cryptocurrency companies in order to facilitate their entry into Abu Dhabi.

news.headline: Stellantis completes second tranche of 2024 share buyback program. Weekly report highlights activity from June 21-26, 2024.
news.summary: Stellantis successfully finished the second tranche of its 2024 Share Buyback Program, reflecting its commitment to bolster shareholder value. The program, aimed at repurchasing around 57 million shares, reached a significant milestone this week. Additionally, the weekly report from June 21-26, 2024, highlighted the company's dedication to this initiative. Through this tranche, Stellantis made significant progress in its strategy to enhance shareholder returns and strengthen its market position. This latest development demonstrates the company's proactive approach to maximizing investor confidence and driving long-term growth.

news.headline: Company's Director and PDMR boosts shareholding, increasing ownership.
1.5M children in England have difficulty engaging in learning, reported by Pearson. 97% of teachers witnessed this.
news.summary: In London today, a new report by Pearson (FTSE: PSON.L) highlighted that approximately 1.5 million children per week are facing challenges in actively participating in their education. This annual report, the Pearson School Report, sourced insights from more than 12,000 teachers, students, and education professionals. It disclosed that during the surveyed week, an overwhelming 97% of teachers observed students struggling to stay engaged in their learning. This marks the third consecutive year of the study, emphasizing the continuing struggle many children are experiencing in connecting with their educational activities.

news.headline: Nokia sells submarine networks business ASN to French State, as per an agreement.
news.summary: Nokia has recently finalized a deal with the French government concerning the sale of its prominent submarine networks division, Alcatel Submarine Networks (ASN). This move marks a significant step for Nokia, as ASN is a key player in the industry, responsible for laying around 40% of the world's subsea cables. This agreement indicates a shift in focus for Nokia, with the sale amounting to approximately €810 million. The deal reflects a strategic decision by Nokia and highlights the company's commitment to reshaping its portfolio to align with its core business areas.

news.headline: Ensurge delivers solid-state lithium microbatteries to medical device company after agreement signed in October 2023. Oslo, Norway.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Ensurge Micropower disclosed that the Company has successfully provided samples of its solid-state lithium microbattery to a client operating in the medical device sector. The agreement for evaluation, publicly declared on October 25, 2023, has been honored with this delivery. Ensurge Micropower's stocks are listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ENSU and on the OTCQB under ENMPY.

news.headline: Company buys back 10,000 of own shares, reducing total voting rights to 90,000.
Fingerprints and Valid partner to launch biometric payment card in Brazil, offering secure, convenient, and hygienic option.
news.summary: In a recent development, Fingerprint Cards AB, known as Fingerprints, and Valid, a worldwide provider and integrator of secure solutions for identification, mobile, and payment systems, have collaborated to create a biometric payment card tailored for the Brazilian market. This innovative card, equipped with Fingerprints’ established biometric technology, is set to introduce enhanced levels of contactless security, convenience, and hygiene to the market. This collaboration is expected to revolutionize the payments sector in Brazil by incorporating cutting-edge biometric features into the payment cards, significantly improving the overall user experience.

news.headline: Karolina Ullman appointed to AS Tallinna Vesi's Supervisory Council by Tallinn, term from 01/07/2024 to 30/06/2027.
news.summary: Karolina Ullman has been selected by the City of Tallinn to serve as a member of the Supervisory Council for AS Tallinna Vesi. Her term on the council will run from July 1, 2024, to June 30, 2027.

news.headline: ASICS upgrades SUPERBLAST 2 with FF TURBO PLUS midsole, 8.0% lighter, 6.0% softer, and 8.2% more energy return than prior model.
news.summary: The new SUPERBLAST (TM) 2 shoe, the latest installment in the beloved Super Trainer series, is now on the market. This version showcases the innovative FF TURBO (TM) PLUS Midsole, known for its exceptional responsiveness and comfort. Compared to the previous model's FF BLAST (TM) TURBO foam, the new midsole is approximately 8.0% lighter, 6.0% softer, and delivers 8.2% more energy return. This upgrade offers an enhanced experience for users seeking top-notch performance in their footwear. The product originates from Kobe, Japan.

news.headline: SquaredFinancial launches Social Trading tool on MetaTrader 4 for trader convenience and efficiency. Introduced on June 27, 2024 from Victoria, Seychelles.
news.summary: In Victoria, Seychelles on June 27, 2024, a prominent fintech firm, SquaredFinancial, has launched Social Trading on the MetaTrader 4 platform (MT4). This new feature aims to cater to traders' investment requirements, providing them with greater convenience and efficiency. This innovation by SquaredFinancial is set to enhance the trading experience for users on MT4, a widely-used platform in the financial industry.

news.headline: AKI named exclusive distributor of SharkNinja in UAE, expanding access to products for consumers.
news.summary: In a recent development on June 27, 2024, in Dubai, UAE, Al Khayyat Investments (AKI) has secured the prestigious position as the sole distribution partner for SharkNinja, Inc. (NYSE: SN) in the UAE. This strategic partnership aims to broaden the market reach of SharkNinja, Inc., a renowned global product design and technology company, offering a wide array of products to consumers. With this collaboration, more customers in the UAE will now have access to the innovative range of products offered by SharkNinja, Inc.

news.headline: Outfit7 launches new YouTube series "Talking Hank's Adventure Guide: Island Living" in collaboration with Brazilian company Hype.
news.summary: Recently, Outfit7, the company behind the famous Talking Tom & Friends franchise, launched a fresh YouTube series titled "Talking Hank's Adventure Guide: Island Living". In partnership with Brazilian company Hype, this series showcases Hank as he acquires survival skills. This release took place on June 27, 2024, in Limassol, Cyprus.

news.headline: Vigil Neuroscience secures $40M strategic investment from Sanofi.
news.summary: A new report reveals that the global economy shrank by 3.5% in 2020 due to the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic. This marks the worst contraction since World War II, affecting various sectors including manufacturing, services, and tourism. The report also indicates that the unemployment rate worldwide surged to 8.8%, equivalent to 220 million people losing jobs last year. It further highlights that the global trade volume plummeted by 9% in 2020 as a result of the pandemic-induced restrictions. Despite the grim picture, the report forecasts a gradual recovery in 2021 with an estimated growth of 4%. This recovery is expected to be led by fiscal support, vaccination drives, and a rebound in consumer demand. Experts stress the importance of continued policy support to facilitate a smooth economic recovery.

news.headline: Spider Tanks showcases new Crossbow weapon, adding strategic depth with unique gameplay mechanics. Explore now!
news.summary: Gala Games debuted the latest addition to Spider Tanks - the Crossbow weapon. This unveiling underscores the weapon's strategic benefits and its impact on gameplay. The Crossbow introduces new dimensions with its unique mechanics. Discover more about this exciting development.

news.headline: Dalian uses Summer Davos to boost foreign investment and international presence, aiming for global economic cooperation growth.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in DALIAN, China, it was reported that the Summer Davos Forum serves as a pivotal event for Dalian, facilitating its international openness, global recognition, and involvement in international economic cooperation. This forum plays a crucial role in boosting Dalian's profile on the global stage.
